message:
fix(imports): Auto-import stdlib modules from runtime.Lib

When a module is not in the dynamic import_registry but exists in
stdlib_modules_gen (auto-discovered Lib/ modules), generate the import
as `runtime.Lib.module_name`. Also check stdlib_modules_gen in the
optional import pattern detection.

This fixes modules like _pylong that have Zig implementations but
weren't being imported because they're not in the manual registry.
